subjects.description: Two crumpled white polythene bags, semi-transparent with thin plastic material, partially inflated by trapped air, sitting on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle
subjects.appearance_details: One bag is slightly larger and more crumpled, the other is smaller and flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.orientation: Facing various directions as they tumble and shift with the wind
subjects.pose: Resting on the road, occasionally lifted and tumbled by gusts of wind
subjects.action: Being tossed and skittering across the asphalt by intermittent wind gusts
subjects.state_changes: Initially tumbling and shifting positions erratically; as the vehicle slows and stops, the bags continue drifting slightly but grow larger in frame due to reduced distance

background_setting: A two-lane urban city road flanked by concrete sidewalks, a few parked cars along the right curb, low-rise commercial buildings with shuttered storefronts on both sides, scattered street trees with sparse green canopies, a traffic signal pole visible in the mid-distance, and a slightly hazy sky above. The road surface is grey asphalt with faded lane markings and occasional patches. Some litter and dust are visible along the road edges, reinforcing the urban, slightly unkempt environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright overcast daylight, diffused sunlight filtering through a thin cloud layer
lighting.direction: Top-lit with slight front-lit bias from the overcast sky ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows beneath parked cars and street trees; minimal harsh shadows due to overcast conditions
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, flat illumination that makes the white polythene bags stand out against the darker asphalt; slight glare on the vehicle hood visible at the bottom of frame

aesthetics.composition: First-person ego-vehicle perspective with the road stretching ahead in one-point perspective; the dashboard/hood edge visible at the bottom; polythene bags positioned along the central vanishing line drawing attention forward
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted urban palette of grey asphalt, off-white and beige building facades, dull greens from sparse trees, with the bright white polythene bags providing contrast
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane urban realism, slightly tense as the vehicle reacts cautiously to perceived obstacles, understated unease
aesthetics.patterns: Faded dashed lane markings repeating along the road surface

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that gradually decelerates and comes to a complete stop; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out as the vehicle halts
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding urban environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the polythene bags; buildings and distant objects remain in focus due to deep depth of field

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or urban driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at moderate city speed along the urban road; in the distance ahead, two white polythene bags become visible on the road surface, tumbling slightly in the wind
The vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably as it approaches the polythene bags; the bags grow larger in frame and are seen skittering and being tossed by wind gusts across the asphalt
The vehicle slows further and comes to a complete stop a few meters from the polythene bags; the bags continue to drift and flutter gently on the road in the wind while the vehicle remains stationary

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White capital letters on a red octagonal sign, slightly weathered
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right background near an intersection pole, partially visible throughout the video
text_and_signage_elements.context: Standard traffic stop sign at an upcoming intersection

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves at a steady pace along a city road. The dashboard and road stretch ahead in perspective. Two white polythene bags appear as small bright specks on the road in the mid-distance, beginning to tumble in the wind.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags go from barely visible specks to recognizable shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at steady speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle begins braking, and the forward motion decelerates visibly. The polythene bags are now clearly visible, tumbling and lifting slightly off the road surface as wind catches them. The approach rate slows noticeably.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle speed transitions from moderate to slow; bags become prominent in the center of frame
segments.camera: Forward motion decelerating, slight pitch-forward of the camera consistent with braking

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a full stop a few meters from the polythene bags. The bags continue to flutter, one lifting briefly before settling back down. The scene is static from the vehicle's perspective while the bags and surrounding leaves move gently in the breeze.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle transitions from moving to fully stationary; bags remain dynamic with wind-driven motion
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a moving vehicle shows a city road stretching ahead with buildings on both sides and parked cars along the curb; two white polythene bags are faintly visible on the road ahead. By 0:01, the vehicle continues forward and the bags become clearer, one tumbling slightly in a gust of wind. At 0:02, the vehicle begins to slow as the polythene bags are now clearly in the vehicle's path, skittering across the asphalt. By 0:03, the vehicle has slowed significantly and is nearly at a stop, the bags just a few meters ahead, one bag lifting momentarily before settling. From 0:03 to 0:05, the vehicle is fully stopped and stationary; the two polythene bags drift and flutter gently on the road surface in the breeze, with the idling vehicle remaining motionless as the urban scene continues around it.
audio_description: Steady engine hum and tire-on-asphalt rolling noise at the start, gradually diminishing as the vehicle decelerates. Subtle wind sounds are present throughout, with the faint rustling and crackling of plastic bags audible as the vehicle nears them. Distant ambient city sounds include faint traffic noise and occasional bird calls. When the vehicle stops, the engine idles quietly and the wind and plastic rustling become the dominant sounds.
